title: ReQuestEd
description: Optimized pack for standalone headsets to make the game faster and easier to handle.
body:
> This pack makes the game much more stable and performs much better with it at chunk rendering.

> It works pretty good on my Quest 2, so It will work much better on newer headsets.

> Everything is tested on local server (singleplayer) so results might be better on a server

> If You want to help me with making the best pack, DM me on dc - _lapixu_13_, see You!

> Updates will be rarely posted because older versions work worse for some reason and i have no reason to change something that works perfectly fine.
